title: harvester input
description: Required dispatch-context keys for the harvester role, per agents/harvester.md Inputs section. Consumed by callers for pre-dispatch validation only -- never appended to the prompt or shown to the LLM.

analysisArtifactFile.description: Relative path (under the repo) to write the sprint analysis artifact to.

analysisText.description: Exact, pre-formatted analysis content to write verbatim.

costAnalysis.description: Exact, pre-computed cost analysis block to insert verbatim into the CHANGELOG entry.

base-branch.description: Branch to diff against for git log/git diff in Step 2.
